channel.title: - Articles
channel.description: You'll find all my tech posts here.

item.title: A letter to my younger self
item.description: Just some advice I would give to my younger self today.

item.title: Sealed interfaces in Kotlin
item.description: Short overview of the sealed interfaces coming up in Kotlin 1.5.

item.title: Jetpack Compose Effect Handlers
item.description: Learn how to run your side effects 🌀 bound to the @Composable lifecycle.

item.title: Tracking side effects at compile time with suspend
item.description: Thinking of suspend as a Kotlin stdlib mechanism for flagging and tracking effects at compile time.

item.title: Jetpack Compose ViewPager
item.description: Let’s use a few minutes to learn how to write a swipeable pager composable.

item.title: Kotlin Continuations
item.description: Continuations represent the rest of a program. They are a form of control flow.

item.title: Support for Kotlin SAM in release 1.4
item.description: About Kotlin SAM support for Java interoperability and also for Kotlin interfaces starting on release 1.4.

item.title: Await next frame in Jetpack Compose
item.description: Learn why view invalidation per se is not a thing in Jetpack Compose.

item.title: Jetpack Compose ConstraintLayout
item.description: Learn how to work with ConstraintLayout in Compose.

item.title: Custom Layouts, measuring and WithConstraints in Jetpack Compose
item.description: This composable is used when we need to measure children according to incoming constraints by their parent.

item.title: Tips for productive online courses
item.description: A few ideas we learned about how to optimize our online courses in 47 Degrees.

item.title: Making state changes explicit with the State Monad
item.description: The astounding Cristo de Monteagudo, very close to my home in Murcia 😲. Let’s discover how to model our state changes in an explicit way in our functional programs.

item.title: Contrasting text and icons over background
item.description: Detecting whether background is dark or light to pick the right foreground color for better contrast.

item.title: Putting view theming into Context
item.description: Some words about how to theme views in code by the Context they’re inflated with.

item.title: Please DO NOT Try to use IO!
item.description: The IO data type is getting deprecated in favor of suspend. Read the post for more details.

item.title: Dependency Inversion on Android Theming
item.description: The concept of DI is something we don’t use to associate with XML files like the Android resources. Let’s learn how Android uses it for theming apps.

item.title: Flutter - Testable architecture using Redux
item.description: Architecture concepts are often common across platforms. Let’s learn how to build an end to end architecture for Flutter using Redux. Our main focus will be testability. ✅

item.title: Flutter Canvas I - Wrap your FAB in a custom progress loader
item.description: I start this Flutter series writing about how to paint to Canvas in Flutter, and how to use it to create our own circled progress loader around a FloatingActionButton ✨

item.title: Polymorphic apps with Arrow
item.description: Typeclasses are all about polymorphism. Achieving it at a program level provides much benefits, but it’s an abstract concept that probably requires a step by step explanation.

item.title: When Android met FP
item.description: Learning new things is hard, and rejecting the unknown is part of human nature. There’s some reaction inside us that makes our minds reject anything new in some way.

item.title: Kotlin Functional Programming II - Monad Transformers
item.description: Step inside to understand how to collapse monad stacks into unified types to reduce nesting 👌

item.title: Kotlin Functional Programming I - Monad Stack
item.description: Functional Programming is about encoding concerns into types. Learn how to create an end to end architecture using them.

item.title: Kotlin Functional Programming, Does it make sense?
item.description: Functional programming can feel like a big wave of fresh air over a beautiful landscape at sunset. The flowers are literally us. 😍 🌼 (maybe?)

item.title: Kotlin purity and function memoization
item.description: Let’s learn about the benefits of “purity” and “pure functions”, and how it affects caching.

item.title: Tail recursion and how to use it in Kotlin
item.description: Learn the concept of tail recursion and how to get the most out of it in the Kotlin language.
